Case Study 01

Torley Insurance Group Hub

Private employee resource dashboard built to organize carrier portals, SOP workflows, forms, and internal agency resources.

UI DesignUX DesignFront-End DevelopmentInformation Architecture

Challenge

Insurance employees needed one organized place to access carrier resources, common workflows, internal forms, and customer service guides without searching through scattered links or notes.

Solution

I designed and developed an internal hub with a private login experience, searchable guide library, carrier portal center, form downloads, employee directory, and guided workflow modals.

Role

UI Design, UX Design, Front-End Development, dashboard structure, interaction planning, and content organization.

Project Screens

A functional hub for daily agency workflows.

“Good internal tools reduce friction.”

This project focused on turning repeat tasks into clear, searchable, step-by-step workflows.
